violations.text: No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 25 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the three compartment sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2024
the Chest Freezer next to the prep unit in the kitchen area was observed to have a broken hinge. Per the PIC, the hinge is to be replaced/repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023
A wet mop was observed sitting in the bottom of the mop bucket at the time of inspection. Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023

The wall in the 3 Bay Sink area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2023
